risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming functionality in the mockup.
risk.mit: Strict adherence to the display-only function and no propulsion or flight performance claims.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment features.
risk.mit: Incorporate additional alignment keys and datum points for repeatable assembly.

risk.mit: Design the cartridge to be removable via defined access paths and fasteners.

risk.desc: Strain relief and bend radius requirements may not be met for cable exits.
risk.mit: Include strain relief geometry and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.
